roadmap.refresh_note: Added Phase 04 (no-network fixture wiring) per /nw-deliver session 2026-04-27 to absorb DEVOPS retrofit must-have-to-ship work. Phase 01 and 02-01/02-02 already complete; 02-03 and 03-* resumed.

phases.name: Walking Skeleton: Manifest, Popup, Service Worker, Offscreen, WebM Download

steps.name: Project scaffolding and build pipeline
steps.criteria: Running `npm run build` produces a `dist/` directory containing a valid Manifest V3 extension that can be loaded in Chromium without errors. The manifest declares tabCapture and offscreen permissions.

steps.name: Shared message and state types
steps.criteria: A types module defines message types for start-recording, stop-recording, recording-started, recording-stopped, and recording-error. A RecordingState type distinguishes idle, recording, and error states. The module contains no runtime code.

steps.name: Popup UI with Start and Stop controls
steps.criteria: Opening the extension popup shows a Start Recording button when idle and a Stop Recording button when recording. Clicking Start sends a start-recording message to the service worker. Clicking Stop sends a stop-recording message. The popup queries the service worker for current state on open.

steps.name: Service worker orchestration and tab capture
steps.criteria: The service worker receives a start-recording message, calls chrome.tabCapture.getMediaStreamId for the active tab, creates an offscreen document, and forwards the stream ID. On stop-recording, it messages the offscreen document to stop. It owns RecordingState and responds to state queries from the popup.

steps.name: Offscreen document with MediaRecorder capture
steps.criteria: The offscreen document receives a stream ID, creates a MediaStream via navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia with the constraint, starts a MediaRecorder, collects chunks, and on stop returns the recorded blob to the service worker. The output is a valid WebM video.

steps.name: WebM download and walking skeleton acceptance test
steps.criteria: After recording stops, the service worker triggers chrome.downloads.download with the WebM blob. A Playwright acceptance test loads the extension, opens a test page, clicks Start, waits, clicks Stop, and verifies a valid WebM file was downloaded.

phases.name: Mp4 Output: Muxing Integration and WebM Fallback

steps.name: Mp4 muxing wrapper
steps.criteria: A pure function accepts a WebM Blob and returns a Promise that resolves to an mp4 Blob. The function wraps the mp4-mux library. A unit test verifies that a sample WebM buffer is converted to a buffer starting with an mp4 ftyp box signature.

steps.name: Integrate mp4 muxing into offscreen capture pipeline
steps.criteria: After MediaRecorder stops, the offscreen document passes the WebM blob through the mp4 muxing wrapper before returning it to the service worker. The downloaded file has an .mp4 extension and is a valid mp4 container.

steps.name: WebM fallback on muxing failure and acceptance test
steps.criteria: If mp4 muxing throws an error, the offscreen document falls back to the original WebM blob, the service worker downloads it with a .webm extension, and sends a recording-error message with a human-readable explanation. An acceptance test verifies that when muxing fails, a WebM file is downloaded and a fallback message is shown in the popup.

phases.name: Polish: Recording Indicator, Tab Audio, Timestamped Filename

steps.name: Recording indicator badge on extension icon
steps.criteria: When recording starts, the extension icon shows a red badge with 'REC' text via chrome.action.setBadgeText. When recording stops, the badge is cleared. An acceptance test verifies the badge appears during recording and disappears after stopping.

steps.name: Tab audio capture
steps.criteria: The captured MediaStream includes the tab's audio track. The recorded mp4 file contains an audio stream when the tab is playing audio. A unit test verifies that the MediaRecorder is configured with both video and audio tracks.

steps.name: Timestamped filename and final acceptance tests
steps.criteria: Downloaded files are named with the pattern broshow-YYYY-MM-DD-HHmmss.mp4 using the user's local time. An acceptance test verifies the downloaded filename matches the expected pattern. All milestone 3 acceptance tests pass.

phases.name: DEVOPS Retrofit: No-Network Fixture Wiring
phases.description: Wire the tests/acceptance/fixtures/no-network.ts helper (created in DISTILL retrofit per DP-6) into the three pre-existing acceptance specs so the zero-network KPI is enforced uniformly across the suite. Without this wiring, the fixture only catches regressions in the new upgrade.spec.ts and stale-state-recovery.spec.ts, leaving the original specs unguarded. These steps must run BEFORE resuming 02-03 and 03-* so any failure path added later inherits the assertion.

steps.name: Wire no-network fixture into walking-skeleton.spec.ts
steps.criteria: tests/acceptance/walking-skeleton.spec.ts imports attachNetworkRecorder and assertZeroExternalNetwork from ./fixtures/no-network. attachNetworkRecorder is called once during context setup; assertZeroExternalNetwork is called at the end of every test (or in afterEach). Running the spec passes with zero external (http/https) network requests recorded.

steps.name: Wire no-network fixture into milestone-2-mp4-output.spec.ts
steps.criteria: tests/acceptance/milestone-2-mp4-output.spec.ts imports and uses attachNetworkRecorder + assertZeroExternalNetwork on the same pattern as 04-01. Running the spec passes with zero external network requests.

steps.name: Wire no-network fixture into milestone-3-polish.spec.ts
steps.criteria: tests/acceptance/milestone-3-polish.spec.ts imports and uses attachNetworkRecorder + assertZeroExternalNetwork on the same pattern as 04-01. Running the spec passes with zero external network requests.

validation.approval_note: Approved as a refreshed-from-existing roadmap with must-have-to-ship scope. Original Phase 01 (walking skeleton) and Phase 02 steps 02-01/02-02 are already COMMIT/PASS in execution-log.json. Phase 02 step 02-03 (WebM fallback) and Phase 03 (polish) resume from the tail. Phase 04 is new and addresses DP-6 (no-network fixture wiring) from DEVOPS retrofit. Out-of-scope per user: DP-2/DP-3 (logger implementation), DP-4/DP-5 (un-skipping upgrade.spec.ts and stale-state-recovery.spec.ts — these stay @skip and are tracked in distill/wave-decisions.md as DELIVER follow-ups), DP-7..DP-15 (CI hardening, ESLint, npm audit, etc.). DES integrity verification (Phase 6 of /nw-deliver skill) is best-effort: DES Python tooling is not installed in this project; execution-log.json is maintained as a tracking record but not formally verified.
